<![CDATA[---
name: ✨ Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement
title: '[Feature] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## ✨ Feature Description
A clear and concise description of the feature you'd like.

## 🎯 Problem It Solves
What problem or limitation does this feature address?

## 👥 Who Benefits
Which user type benefits from this?
- [ ] Illiterate users (voice-only interaction)
- [ ] Telugu/Urdu/Hindi readers
- [ ] Basic phone users
- [ ] Developers/contributors
- [ ] All users

## 💡 Proposed Solution
Describe how this feature would work from the user's perspective.

## 🔄 Alternatives Considered
What other approaches did you consider? Why is the proposed solution better?

## 📋 Checklist
- [ ] This feature supports the three-tier offline fallback
- [ ] This feature does not introduce telemetry or cloud dependencies
- [ ] This feature follows the Islamic content integrity rules
- [ ] This feature maintains accessibility standards (16sp+ fonts, 48dp+ touch targets)

## 📸 Mockups
If applicable, add sketches or mockups of the proposed feature.

## 💡 Additional Context
Add any other context, references, or examples here.
]]>
